key_findings.authoring_modes: manual (MVP default) and structured (beta only, behind feature flag prescricao_structured_authoring)
key_findings.safety_guardrail: usePrescriptionSafety hook sums doses across all items, compares against UL from catalog. Statuses: safe/warning/danger. Only active when structured authoring is enabled.
key_findings.substance_catalog: Categories: Vitaminas, Minerais, Aminoacidos, Fitoterapicos, Acidos Graxos, Probioticos, Antioxidantes, Adaptogenos, Enzimas
key_findings.vias_administracao: oral, sublingual, topico, injetavel, nasal, retal, ocular, outro
key_findings.formas_farmaceuticas: Capsula, Comprimido, Po, Liquido, Sache, Sublingual, Spray, Gel, Creme
key_findings.favorites: Save as template, import with replace or merge modes
key_findings.bulk_add: ModalAdicionarEmMassa for adding multiple substances at once

patterns_followed: content/docs/modulos/exames.mdx (full reference with tables and callouts)
